name: Blueberry & Lemon Bread-And-Butter Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Freshly squeezed Lemon juice, strained
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread bread with butter and arrange 4 slices, butter side down, over the base of a buttered 6-cup ovenproof dish.
2. Sprinkle half the blueberries over the bread, then top with another 4 slices of bread and remaining blueberries.
3. Cut each remaining bread slice into 3 strips and arrange in a lattice pattern over the blueberries.
4. Whisk together the milk, lemon juice, eggs, sugar, 1 tablespoon Cointreau, and a pinch of salt in a bowl. Pour evenly over bread in dish, cover, and stand at room temperature for 1 hour, or chill overnight.
5. Heat marmalade with remaining Cointreau in a small saucepan over medium heat until melted and well combined. Brush over the surface of the pudding.
6. Place the dish in a baking pan and pour in enough hot water to reach halfway up the sides of the dish. Bake at 180°C for 50 minutes or until custard is just set.
7. Serve pudding warm or at room temperature with cream, if desired.
